name: Resserra (Listoria)
description: Offline-first inventory platform for Filipino SMBs - home, sari-sari, and multi-branch. Stock receive, dispatch, transfer, and adjustments work fully offline and sync on reconnect. Flutter (BLoC, Drift) on mobile, NestJS + PostgreSQL backend. In live private pilots, including a construction contractor running Costerra - its project cost and worker payroll module.

name: Kaufmann Mobile
description: Android app for Territory and District managers - offline call management with sync on reconnect.

name: L.A.R.A.
description: Internal Android app built at Trend Micro for learning and achievement tracking - skills tree, leaderboard, enrollment. Built alongside primary support role; contributed to Employee of the Quarter recognition. (Proprietary - screenshots not shown.)

name: Innovative HRIS
description: Client-deployed HRIS mobile app - QR/PIN timekeeping, schedules, time-log reports, leave requests, announcements, and push notifications. Android + iOS. (Proprietary - screenshots not shown.)

name: Innovative Timekeeping
description: Client-deployed timekeeping app for PAX Aries8 terminals - PIN and QR-based time-in/time-out. (Proprietary - screenshots not shown.)

name: Go3 POS
description: Client-deployed point-of-sale terminal app - authentication, appointment scheduling, multi-method payments. Kotlin. (Proprietary - screenshots not shown.)

name: Nail Salon Website
description: Client website for a nail salon, built at Innovative Solutions Inc - responsive front-end presenting services and driving customer inquiries. (Proprietary - screenshots not shown.)

name: Restaurant Website
description: Client website for a restaurant, built at Innovative Solutions Inc - responsive front-end with menu presentation. (Proprietary - screenshots not shown.)
